hero.title: Make your <accent>business</accent> work for you
hero.subtitle: We automate the tasks that steal your time so you can sell more and grow faster.

benefits.title: Let automations do the busywork
benefits.subtitle: We build, monitor, and optimize your n8n workflows so your team ships faster, makes fewer mistakes, and gets a live view of results.

saveTime.title: Save hours every week
saveTime.body: Automate repetitive tasks like data sync, lead routing, and report exports. Your team focuses on work that moves the needle.

fewerErrors.title: Fewer errors, consistent results
fewerErrors.body: Standardized n8n workflows reduce manual mistakes and create predictable, auditable processes across tools.

visibility.title: Full visibility on a live dashboard
visibility.body: Track runs, success rate, and throughput. Drill into logs and alerts so issues are spotted before customers notice.

connectStack.title: Connect your stack in minutes
connectStack.body: Hundreds of integrations across CRM, email, spreadsheets, ads, payments, and internal APIs—without brittle glue code.

security.title: Secure & GDPR-friendly by design
security.body: Scoped API keys, role-based access, encrypted secrets, and data residency options to keep compliance simple.

roi.title: Proven ROI for SMBs
roi.body: Automations pay for themselves by reducing busywork, preventing churn, and unlocking always-on operations.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From discovery to dashboard, we partner with your team to deliver reliable automations and visible impact.

discovery.title: 1 · Discovery
discovery.body: We identify the tasks that steal the most time.

design.title: 2 · Design
design.body: We create automated flows tailored to your business.

build.title: 3 · Integration
build.body: We connect your tools so everything works without friction.

monitor.title: 4 · Automation
monitor.body: Prozeso starts working for you, day and night.

iterate.title: 5 · Optimization
iterate.body: We keep improving so each day you worry less and earn more.

scale.title: 6 · Ongoing partnership
scale.body: We don’t leave you on your own. We monitor your automations, spot improvements, and keep everything up to date.

howItWorks.ctaPrompt: Ready to spot your highest‑ROI automations?

stats.title: Real results from real automation
stats.subtitle: Our clients transform operations by automating what used to take hours into tasks that run while they sleep.

automationCount.desc: Each workflow tailored and monitored for performance.

tasksExecuted.label: Tasks executed monthly
tasksExecuted.desc: Reliably processed across all connected platforms.

hoursSaved.label: Hours saved per year
hoursSaved.desc: Through reduced manual input and automated reporting.

successRate.label: Execution success rate
successRate.desc: Proactive monitoring ensures uptime and reliability.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Proof that automation pays off — in hours saved, errors prevented, and revenue protected.

item1.quote: We replaced three manual handoffs with a single n8n flow. Reports that took all Friday now arrive before 9am.
item1.name: María López

item2.quote: The dashboard gave us visibility we didn’t have. We spotted a leaking segment and recovered ~12% MRR in two weeks.
item2.name: James Patel

item3.quote: Security reviews were smooth: RBAC, encrypted secrets, and logs out‑of‑the-box. Zero production incidents in 6 months.
item3.name: Sofia Nguyen

finalCta.title: Let Prozeso work for you
finalCta.subtitle: Start automating your business today and win back the time you need to grow.

list.title: Automation catalog
list.subtitle: Browse ready-to-use workflows. We tailor each automation to your stack and set up monitoring & alerts.

hero.title: Let’s see how your business could keep working while you keep serving customers
hero.subtitle: Try a live demo to discover how Prozeso will help you in day‑to‑day operations.

whatInDemo.q: What will I see in the demo?
whatInDemo.a: A short walkthrough of the core flow so you can understand how we work together end-to-end.

howLong.a: Usually under 3 minutes — quick and to the point.

nextStep.q: What’s the next step after watching?
nextStep.a: Book a free assessment — we’ll tailor the plan to your needs and timeline.

tailoredFlow.title: Tailored flow
tailoredFlow.desc: In minutes, we’ll show you how to automate the tasks that are stealing your time today.

builtInComms.title: Integrated communications
builtInComms.desc: See how your business can attend, schedule, and reply without depending on anyone.

paymentsTrust.title: Payments & trust
paymentsTrust.desc: Leave with a clear view of how to gain time, professionalism, and peace of mind from day one.

hero.title: Take the first step toward a business that never stops
hero.subtitle: We listen, understand your day to day, and design a system that works for you—even when you can’t.

intro.title: Tell us your story
intro.desc: Every business has its rhythm. We want to understand yours: how you work, what slows you down, and what you’d like to change.

call.title: We design your system
call.desc: We automate the tasks that steal your time—calls, appointments, messages—so your day revolves around what truly matters again.

launch.title: Start to breathe
launch.desc: While you keep serving your customers, the system takes care of the rest. No stress, no interruptions, no lost revenue.

assessment.cardSubtitle: No commitment. Just a conversation to discover how your business can gain time, order, and peace of mind.

goals.label: What are you looking for?
goals.placeholder: Tell us briefly what you’d like to achieve...

assessment.disclaimer: We work with real businesses that need time back to enjoy what they do—without stopping growth.

success.title: Thanks! We’ve got your request.
success.body: Our team will contact you shortly to schedule your free call.

assessment.serverErrorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.lead: Every minute you spend on repetitive tasks is a minute you’re not spending growing your business.
paragraphs: Answering calls. Scheduling appointments. Sending emails. Updating spreadsheets.
All those little tasks that keep you busy… are the same ones that keep you from moving forward.
Your time is worth more. And so is your business.
problem.subtitle: Manual, brittle operations slow your team and hide what's really happening.

time.title: Too much manual work
time.body: Repetitive tasks drain hours each week and delay the work that matters.

fragile.title: Fragile glue between tools
fragile.body: Spreadsheets, zaps, and ad‑hoc scripts break silently and are hard to audit.

errors.title: Errors and rework
errors.body: Data mismatches and missed steps create customer issues and costly rework.

cost.title: Rising costs as you scale
cost.body: More volume means more manual effort — operations don’t scale with the business.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.subtitle: Reliable automations designed, monitored, and optimized for your stack.
solution.lead: Turn manual processes into automatic systems that work 24/7.
bullets: Your customers get an immediate response without you picking up the phone.
Appointments book themselves while you sleep.
Leads are captured and qualified automatically without anyone touching a CRM.
solution.outro: We analyze how you work, automate what’s holding you back, and let Prozeso do the heavy lifting for you.

connect.title: Connect your tools
connect.body: Integrate CRM, email, sheets, ads, billing, and internal APIs with n8n.

standard.title: Standardize processes
standard.body: Clear triggers, validation, retries, and alerts to keep flows predictable.

secure.title: Secure by design
secure.body: Encrypted secrets, RBAC, and audit logs built into every workflow.

optimize.title: Monitor and improve
optimize.body: Live dashboards and iteration to increase throughput and reliability.

impact.title: The Impact
impact.subtitle: Visible results that compound over time.
paragraphs: It’s getting back productive hours, reducing operating costs, and freeing your team to focus on what truly matters: serving better, selling more, and growing without limits.

reservations.title: More confirmed bookings
reservations.body: Up to 40% more confirmed bookings thanks to instant replies.

hours.title: Hours reclaimed
hours.body: More than 10 hours per week reclaimed per employee.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.body: Always-on customer attention without hiring more staff.

costs.title: Lower operating costs
costs.body: Operating cost reductions of up to 30%.
